meta.defaultDescription: Devline.digital — a Georgian software studio: web and mobile apps, Jira/JSM setup, design, and marketing.

projects.label: Our Projects
projects.text: A look at what we've built.

footer.tagline: Human-centered service, backed by experience and innovation.

slides.title: Digital products that put your business to work
slides.text: Devline is a Georgian software studio — we build web and mobile applications, DevOps pipelines, and infrastructure with a full-cycle approach: from idea to production.

slides.title: From idea to production — one team
slides.text: We build web and mobile applications with a single team, so design, development, and launch fit together naturally.

slides.title: Your infrastructure — our responsibility
slides.text: CI/CD pipelines, cloud and on-prem environments, monitoring, and 24/7 support — releases without the stress.

section.title: What we do
section.text: Four disciplines under one roof — from development to marketing, all working in sync.

programmers.title: Developer
programmers.blurb: Web and mobile development, DevOps, infrastructure, analytics, and ongoing support.

jsm.title: IT Software
jsm.blurb: Configuration and management of ClickUp, JSM, Jira, and Slack for your team.

designers.title: Design
designers.blurb: Figma, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and Premiere — from design to video production.

marketers.title: Marketing
marketers.blurb: Ad campaigns on Meta platforms and search engine optimization (SEO).

web.title: Web Applications
web.text: Fast, scalable web products built on React.js — from corporate sites to complex portals.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.text: Cross-platform applications written in Flutter for iOS and Android with a single codebase.
features: Cross-platform apps for iOS & Android with Flutter

devops.title: DevOps & CI/CD
devops.text: GitLab CI/CD pipelines, automated deployment, and monitoring — stress-free releases.

infra.title: Infrastructure
infra.text: Planning, administration, security, and optimization of cloud and on-prem environments.

support.title: Support
support.text: SLA-based ongoing support, monitoring, and product development after launch.

clickup.title: ClickUp
clickup.text: Configuration and customization of your ClickUp workspace, projects, and workflows.

jsmPortal.title: JSM
jsmPortal.text: Setup of Jira Service Management's Customer Portal, SLAs, and request types.

jira.title: Jira
jira.text: Configuration and support for Jira projects, workflows, and automations.

slack.title: Slack
slack.text: Workspace structuring, integrations, and notification automation for Slack.

figma.title: Figma
figma.text: UI/UX design and interactive prototyping in Figma — for web and mobile interfaces.

photoshop.title: Adobe Photoshop
photoshop.text: Image editing, retouching, and visual asset preparation.

metaMarketing.title: Meta Product Marketing
metaMarketing.text: Planning, launching, and optimizing ad campaigns on Facebook and Instagram.

seo.title: SEO
seo.text: Improving search engine rankings — technical SEO, content, and link strategy.

analytics.title: Web Analytics
analytics.text: We track, store, and report on your website's traffic and user behavior — so every decision is backed by real data.

section.title: Our methodology
section.text: We build stable, transparent processes based on industry-proven frameworks and practices.

agile.title: Agile & Scrum
agile.text: We manage our workflow with the Agile/Scrum methodology — short iterations and transparent progress every week.

devopsCulture.title: DevOps culture
devopsCulture.text: CI/CD, infrastructure-as-code, and automation are at the center of every project — releases are no longer stressful.

itsm.title: IT Service Management
itsm.text: Structured operational processes based on ITSM principles — from incident management to SLAs.

cta.title: Want to talk to an expert?
cta.text: Get in touch and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

section.title: Engineers who know production
section.text: Devline.digital brings together a team with real experience working in enterprise environments — development, DevOps, systems administration, and security. To us, a good product isn't just a pretty interface: it's a stable pipeline, measurable performance, and a team that always responds.

fullCycle.title: Full-cycle
fullCycle.text: One team, from idea to production

automationFirst.title: Automation-first
automationFirst.text: CI/CD and monitoring on every project

section.text: We write a single codebase in Flutter that works just as naturally on iOS and Android — half the time, double the audience. We take care of everything from design to publishing on the App Store/Play Store.

features: Automated builds with CI/CD and store publishing

page.title: Mobile apps for iOS and Android
page.text: A single codebase written in Flutter, with a native feel on both platforms — from design to store publishing.

section.title: A website that puts your business to work
section.text: We build fast, scalable web products on React.js — from corporate sites to complex, data-driven portals.
We set up and manage Jira and Jira Service Management — from workflows to Customer Portal and SLAs, tailored to your team's real process.

features: Initial configuration and migration for Jira & JSM
Customer Portal design and SLA setup
Integrations with Confluence and your other tools

section.text: Figma, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and Premiere — we create interfaces, branding, and visual content that make your product stand out.

features: UI/UX design and interactive prototypes in Figma
Branding, logos, and visual identity in Illustrator
Image editing and retouching in Photoshop
Video editing and post-production in Premiere

section.text: From Meta ad campaigns to SEO — we plan, launch, and analyze marketing activities that deliver measurable results.

features: Planning and launching Facebook and Instagram campaigns
Search engine optimization (SEO) — technical and content strategy
